# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object overrides copied from active-stack construction winners.
# Dataset-driven job pressure: if a planet has unemployed pops and no free jobs, build economically viable job providers instead of leaving pops idle.
# Source potential/allow/possible blocks still own prerequisites and legality.
# Source dataset: research/stellar-ai/stellar-ai-director-economic-valuation-2026-07-07.csv

# object = building:building_organic_paradise; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\08_unity_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:3000.0 roi2250:21693100.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_organic_paradise = {
	base_buildtime = @b2_time
	can_build = no
	icon = building_paradise_dome

	category = unity

	building_sets = {
		bio_trophy
		urban
		unity
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor
			is_hospitality_servitor_empire = no
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		NOT = { owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor } }
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_paradise_dome
		building_communal_housing_large
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b2_upkeep
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_upkeep
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_bio_trophy_add = 3000
	}

	prerequisites = { "tech_paradise_dome" }

	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
	}

	ai_weight_coefficient = 29

	# Here we try to adress the second issue that the AI cant evaluate the pop job output of the bio trophy given the happiness trigger that was put inplace to guard against players exploiting bio trophies

	#science

	#alloys

	#cgs
	additional_ai_weight = 15000
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 20
		consumer_goods = 20
		physics_research = 20
		unity = 60
	}
}

# object = building:building_passenger_paradise; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\24_nomads_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:1500.0 roi2250:10896700.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_passenger_paradise = {
	base_buildtime = @b2_time
	can_build = no
	icon = building_paradise_dome

	category = unity

	building_sets = {
		ark_forever_cruise_passengers
	}

	potential = {
		owner? = {
			has_origin = origin_forever_cruise
			NOT = { has_country_flag = forever_cruise_over }
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		owner? = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_forever_cruise }
				has_country_flag = forever_cruise_over
			}
		}
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_paradise_dome
		building_communal_housing_large
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b2_upkeep
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_upkeep
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_cruise_passenger_add = 1500
		planet_housing_add = 1500
	}

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_paradise_dome"
	}

	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		owner? = {
			has_origin = origin_forever_cruise
			NOT = { has_country_flag = forever_cruise_over }
		}
	}

	ai_weight_coefficient = 28

	#science

	#alloys

	#cgs
	additional_ai_weight = 14111
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 20
		consumer_goods = 20
		physics_research = 20
		unity = 60
	}
}

# object = building:building_organic_sanctuary; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\08_unity_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:1500.0 roi2250:10872000.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_organic_sanctuary = {
	base_buildtime = @b1_time

	category = unity

	building_sets = {
		bio_trophy
		urban
		unity
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor
			is_hospitality_servitor_empire = no
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		OR = {
			owner = {
				NOT = { owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor } }
			}
			AND = {
				owner = { is_ai = yes }
				count_owned_pop_amount = {
					limit = {
						has_citizenship_type = {
							type = citizenship_organic_trophy
							country = owner
						}
					}
					count <= 2000
				}
				num_buildings = { type = building_organic_sanctuary value > 3 }
			}
			AND = {
				owner = { is_ai = yes }
				count_owned_pop_amount = {
					limit = {
						has_citizenship_type = {
							type = citizenship_organic_trophy
							country = owner
						}
					}
					count <= 4000
				}
				num_buildings = { type = building_organic_paradise value > 5 }
			}
		}
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_luxury_residence
		building_communal_housing
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b1_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_bio_trophy_add = 1500
	}

	upgrades = {
		"building_organic_paradise"
	}

	# We need to cheat here and tell AI that this will probably give some complex output since AI can not evaluate what this building does without the pops which it cant get without the building - chicken and egg

	ai_weight_coefficient = 28

	# Here we try to adress the second issue that the AI cant evaluate the pop job output of the bio trophy given the happiness trigger that was put inplace to guard against players exploiting bio trophies

	#science

	#alloys

	#cgs
	additional_ai_weight = 14111
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 15
		consumer_goods = 10
		physics_research = 20
		unity = 40
	}
}

# object = building:building_mem_lost_emperor_ancient_palace; source = More Events Mod::common\buildings\mem_lost_emperor_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:880.0 roi2250:10159200.0 flags:has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs
building_mem_lost_emperor_ancient_palace = {
	base_buildtime = 480
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	icon = building_palace

	category = government

	building_sets = {
		government
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			has_country_flag = mem_neochadamus_ascendant
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		owner = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = mem_neochadamus_ascendant }
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_stability_add = 25
		job_fe_overseer_add = 200
		job_fe_protector_add = 200
		logistic_growth_mult = 1
		bonus_pop_growth_mult = 1
		planet_pop_assembly_add = 10
		planet_housing_add = 5000
		planet_amenities_add = 2000
		#planet_max_buildings_add = 5

		job_artisan_add = 150
		job_foundry_add = 150
		job_physicist_add = 50
		job_biologist_add = 50
		job_engineer_add = 50
		job_entertainer_add = 30
	}

	country_modifier = {
		country_naval_cap_add = 500
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		produces = {
			energy = 1000
			minerals = 1000
			food = 1000
			alloys = 500
			consumer_goods = 500
			sr_dark_matter = 15
			rare_crystals = 15
			volatile_motes = 15
			exotic_gases = 15
			physics_research = 500
			society_research = 500
			engineering_research = 500
		}
	}

	upgrades = {
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 100
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 9142

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 500
		consumer_goods = 500
		energy = 1000
		engineering_research = 500
		exotic_gases = 15
		food = 1000
		minerals = 1000
		physics_research = 500
		rare_crystals = 15
		society_research = 500
		sr_dark_matter = 15
		volatile_motes = 15
	}
}

# object = building:building_negative_mass_factory_2; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:1200.0 roi2250:8643300.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_negative_mass_factory_2 = {
	base_buildtime = 1000
	category = manufacturing
	can_build = no

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_nm_utilization_2"
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
        generator
        giga_negative_mass
	}

	potential = {
		nor = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		or = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_add = @b2_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b4_minerals
			exotic_gases = @b3_rare_cost
			rare_crystals = @b3_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b3_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 11681
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 12
	}
}

# object = building:xeno_geology_holomuseum; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\21_grand_archive_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:1000.0 roi2250:7228200.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
xeno_geology_holomuseum = {
	base_buildtime = @b1_time
	empire_limit = 1
	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
		research
		resort
	}

	potential = {
		owner = {
			has_country_flag = received_collection_stage_2_reward_xeno_geology
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = alloys
			COST = @b1_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				owner = { is_wilderness_empire = yes }
			}
			biomass = @b2_biomass
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}

	country_modifier = {
		xeno_geology_specimens_produces_mult = @holomuseum_specimen_produces_mult
	}

	triggered_country_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		xeno_geology_specimens_produces_mult = @holomuseum_specimen_produces_mult
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = jobs/entertainers_add
		AMOUNT = @building_static_jobs
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		planet_entertainers_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_engineering_research_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_consumer_goods_upkeep_add = 0.25
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		job_entertainer_add = @building_static_jobs
		planet_entertainers_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_engineering_research_produces_add = 0.25
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		text = entertainers_are_curators_tt
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		text = evaluators_are_curator_drones_tt
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_evaluator_add = @building_static_jobs_high
		planet_evaluators_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_engineering_research_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_minerals_upkeep_add = 0.5
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		job_evaluator_add = @building_static_jobs_high
		planet_evaluators_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_engineering_research_produces_add = 0.25
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 10058
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 10
		engineering_research = 1
		unity = 1
	}
}

# object = building:galactic_history_holomuseum; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\21_grand_archive_buildings.txt

galactic_history_holomuseum = {
	base_buildtime = @b1_time
	empire_limit = 1
	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
		research
		resort
	}

		owner = {
			has_country_flag = received_collection_stage_2_reward_historical_item
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = alloys
			COST = @b1_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				owner = { is_wilderness_empire = yes }
			}
			biomass = @b2_biomass
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}

	country_modifier = {
		historical_item_specimens_produces_mult = @holomuseum_specimen_produces_mult
	}

	triggered_country_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		historical_item_specimens_produces_mult = @holomuseum_specimen_produces_mult
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = jobs/entertainers_add
		AMOUNT = @building_static_jobs
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		planet_entertainers_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_society_research_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_consumer_goods_upkeep_add = 0.25
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		job_entertainer_add = @building_static_jobs
		planet_entertainers_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_entertainers_society_research_produces_add = 0.25
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		text = entertainers_are_curators_tt
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		text = evaluators_are_curator_drones_tt
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_evaluator_add = @building_static_jobs_high
		planet_evaluators_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_society_research_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_minerals_upkeep_add = 0.5
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
				has_ascension_perk = ap_archaeoengineers
			}
		}
		job_evaluator_add = @building_static_jobs_high
		planet_evaluators_unity_produces_add = 0.25
		planet_evaluators_society_research_produces_add = 0.25
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 10058
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

		society_research = 1

	}

# object = building:building_augmentation_center; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\20_machine_age_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:800.0 roi2250:5775600.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_augmentation_center = {
	base_buildtime = @b3_time

	desc = { # Regular empire, default
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_cybernetic_creed }
				NOR = {
					has_country_flag = cyber_control_government
					has_country_flag = cyber_control_corporate
					has_country_flag = cyber_control_independent
				}
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_desc
	}

	desc = { # Regular empire, government control
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_cybernetic_creed }
				has_country_flag = cyber_control_government
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_government_desc
	}

	desc = { # Regular empire, corporate control
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_cybernetic_creed }
				has_country_flag = cyber_control_corporate
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_corporate_desc
	}

	desc = { # Regular empire, independent control
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_cybernetic_creed }
				has_country_flag = cyber_control_independent
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_independent_desc
	}

	desc = { # Cybernetic Creed
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_origin = origin_cybernetic_creed
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_creed_desc
	}

	desc = { # Hive
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		text = building_augmentation_center_hive_desc
	}

	category = pop_assembly

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
		research
		engineering
	}

	planet_limit = 1

	potential = {
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = augmentation_center_available
				has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_augmentation_centers
				has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_assimilator_augmentation_centers
			}
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			NOR = {
				has_country_flag = augmentation_center_available
				has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_augmentation_centers
				has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_assimilator_augmentation_centers
			}
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_augmentation_centers
					has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator
				}
			}
		}
		auto_mod_monthly_add = 600
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_augmentor_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_active_tradition = tr_cybernetics_augmentation_overload }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_augmentor_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_augmentor_drone_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_augmentor_drone_add = 200
		}
	}

	### CONTROLLING SECTOR MODIFIERS ###
	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Government control, after Cyberization
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_augmentation_center_government
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_jobs_unity_produces_mult = 0.10
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Corporate control, after Cyberization
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_augmentation_center_corporate
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_jobs_consumer_goods_produces_mult = 0.10
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Independent control, after Cyberization
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_augmentation_center_independent
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_jobs_upkeep_mult = -0.05
		}
	}

	### JOB STRATA FOCUS MODIFIERS ###
	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Ruler focus
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_focus_rulers
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			pop_cat_ruler_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Specialist focus
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_focus_specialists
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			pop_cat_specialist_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { # Worker focus
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_focus_workers
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			pop_cat_worker_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { # General focus
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_country_flag = cyber_focus_everyone
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_jobs_produces_mult = 0.05
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b3_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b3_upkeep
		}
	}

	is_essential = yes
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 8428
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 1
		unity = 1
	}
}

# object = building:building_negative_mass_factory_1; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:600.0 roi2250:4323700.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_negative_mass_factory_1 = {
	base_buildtime = @b4_time
	category = manufacturing

	upgrades = {
		building_negative_mass_factory_2
	}

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_nm_utilization_1"
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
        generator
		giga_negative_mass
	}

	potential = {
		nor = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		or = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_add = @b1_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b4_minerals
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_cost
			rare_crystals = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b3_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 6791
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 6
	}
}

# object = building:building_passenger_dorms; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\24_nomads_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:500.0 roi2250:3675600.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_passenger_dorms = {
	icon = building_organic_sanctuary
	base_buildtime = @b1_time

	category = unity

	building_sets = {
		ark_forever_cruise_passengers
	}

	potential = {
		owner? = {
			has_origin = origin_forever_cruise
			NOT = { has_country_flag = forever_cruise_over }
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		owner? = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_origin = origin_forever_cruise }
				has_country_flag = forever_cruise_over
			}
		}
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_luxury_residence
		building_communal_housing
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b1_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_cruise_passenger_add = 500
		planet_housing_add = 500
	}

	upgrades = {
		"building_passenger_paradise"
	}

	# We need to cheat here and tell AI that this will probably give some complex output since AI can not evaluate what this building does without the pops which it cant get without the building - chicken and egg

	ai_weight_coefficient = 26

	# Here we try to adress the second issue that the AI cant evaluate the pop job output of the bio trophy given the happiness trigger that was put inplace to guard against players exploiting bio trophies

	#science

	#alloys

	#cgs
	additional_ai_weight = 5970
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 15
		consumer_goods = 10
		physics_research = 20
		unity = 40
	}
}

# object = building:building_primitive_factory; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\11_primitive_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:400.0 roi2250:2887200.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs
building_primitive_factory = {
	can_build = no
	planet_limit = 1
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no

	category = manufacturing

	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}

	potential = {
		always = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = no
			}
		}
		job_primitive_laborer_add = @building_static_jobs
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_fabricator_add = @building_static_jobs
	}

#	upgrades = {
#		building_foundry_1
#		building_factory_1
#	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = no
		}
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5138
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 4
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_equatorial_factory; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:400.0 roi2250:2880600.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep
building_giga_equatorial_factory = {
	category = resource
	can_build = no
	icon = unused/building_carrion_processor_2

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
			alloys = 2
		}
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		district_giga_planet_alloys_artisan_replacement = 100 # any value > 0 activates the effect
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		job_maintenance_drone_add = 400
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5138
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 4
	}
}

# object = building:esc_building_reprocessing_plant; source = Extra Ship Components NEXT::common\buildings\esc_buildings_resources.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:200.0 roi2250:1450880.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep
esc_building_reprocessing_plant = {
	base_buildtime = 360
	planet_limit = 1
	icon = esc_building_reprocessing_plant
	category = manufacturing

	building_sets = {
		industrial
		urban
	}

	potential = {
		NOT = { has_modifier = resort_colony }
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
		NOT = { has_global_flag = ESC_GLOBAL_FLAG_scrapper_tech_forbidden }
		exists = owner
		owner = { has_country_flag = scrapper_killed }
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	resources = {
        category = planet_buildings
        cost = {
			minerals = 400
			rare_crystals = 10
			exotic_gases = 10
        }
        upkeep = {
			energy = 3
        }
	}

	# regular empires
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_pops_consumer_goods_upkeep_mult = -0.1
			pop_amenities_usage_mult = -0.1
			job_esc_reprocessor_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_esc_reprocessor_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_effect_desc
	}

	# gestalt empires
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			pop_amenities_usage_no_happiness_mult = -0.2
			job_esc_reprocessor_drone_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_esc_reprocessor_drone_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
				NOT = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
			}
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_drone_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_drone_rs_effect_desc
	}

	prerequisites = { "esc_tech_reprocessing_plant" }

	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 3448
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 4
		consumer_goods = 2
	}
}

# object = building:building_mp_machine_primitive_factory; source = More Primitives::common\buildings\mp_primitive_buildings.txt
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:200.0 roi2250:1443600.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs
building_mp_machine_primitive_factory = {
	icon = building_primitive_factory
	can_build = no
	base_cap_amount = 1
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no

	category = manufacturing

	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = yes
			is_machine_empire = yes
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = singularity_age
				has_country_flag = singularity_age_servitor
			}
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				is_primitive = no
				is_machine_empire = no
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_primitive_hive_factory_drone_add = 200
	}

	upgrades = {
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 3448
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 2
	}
}

building_hive_primitive_factory = {
	icon = building_primitive_factory
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no

	category = manufacturing

	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = yes
			is_hive_empire = yes
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = steam_age
				has_country_flag = machine_age
				has_country_flag = industrial_age
				has_country_flag = atomic_age
				has_country_flag = early_space_age
			}
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				is_primitive = no
				is_hive_empire = no
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_primitive_hive_factory_drone_add = 200
	}

	upgrades = {
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 3448
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 2
	}

		category = planet_buildings
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}
